zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Philip Courtenay於大約1345年出生在英國戴文波德哈姆時，他的父親Hugh Courtenay III43歲，母親Margaret de Bohun35歲。他與Anne Wake在英國戴文波德哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1367年登記服兵役。他於1383年被列為lord lieutenant of ireland。他去世於1406年7月29日在英國戴文波德哈姆 卡素享年62歲，埋葬在英國戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Philip Courtenay于大约1345年出生在英国戴文波德哈姆时，他的父亲Hugh Courtenay III43岁，母亲Margaret de Bohun35岁。他与Anne Wake在英国戴文波德哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1367年登记服兵役。他于1383年被列为lord lieutenant of ireland。他去世于1406年7月29日在英国戴文波德哈姆 卡素享年62岁，埋葬在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Philip Courtenay was born about 1345, in Powderham, Devon, England, his father, Hugh Courtenay III, was 43 and his mother, Margaret de Bohun, was 35. He married Anne Wake in Powderham, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1367. In 1383, his occupation is listed as lord lieutenant of ireland. He died on 29 July 1406, in Powderham Castle, Devon, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Philip Courtenay est né environ 1345, à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Courtenay III, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Bohun, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Anne Wake à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1367. En 1383, sa profession de son indiquée est lord lieutenant of ireland. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1406, à Powderham Castle, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Philip Courtenay um 1345 in Powderham, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Courtenay III 43 und seine Mutter Margaret de Bohun 35. Er hat in Powderham, Devon, England Anne Wake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1367 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1383 ist sein Beruf als lord lieutenant of ireland aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. Juli 1406 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Powderham Castle, Devon, England und wurde in Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Philip Courtenay è nato il circa 1345 nel Powderham, Devon, England, il suo padre, Hugh Courtenay III, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Bohun, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Anne Wake nel Powderham, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1367. Nel 1383, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord lieutenant of ireland. Morì il 29 luglio 1406, nel Powderham Castle, Devon, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Philip Courtenayが約1345年にイギリスデボンポウデルハムで生まれた時，父Hugh Courtenay IIIは43歳，母Margaret de Bohunは35歳であった。イギリスデボンポウデルハムでAnne Wakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1367年に兵役登録をした。1383年，職業はlord lieutenant of irelandと記録されている。彼は1406年7月29日にイギリスデボンポウデルハム カストルで62歳で死去し，イギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Philip Courtenay(이)가 대략 1345년 영국 데폰 파우더함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Courtenay III(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Bohun(은)는 35세였다. 그는 영국 데폰 파우더함에서 Anne Wake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1383년, 그의 직업은 lord lieutenant of ireland이었다. 그는 1406년 7월 29일 영국 데폰 파우더함 카스틀에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Philip Courtenay nasceu aproximadamente 1345, em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Courtenay III, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Bohun, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Wake em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1367. Em 1383, sua profissão aparece como lord lieutenant of ireland. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1406, em Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Philip Courtenay родился около 1345 г. в местности поудирам, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Courtenay III было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Bohun, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Wake в местности поудирам, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1367 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1383 годуработал по профессии lord lieutenant of ireland. Он умер 29 июля 1406 г. в местности поудирам кастл, девон, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия.

sm.from 1383 to 1393: mai le 1383 e o'o I le 1393

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Philip Courtenay nació aproximadamente 1345, en Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Courtenay III, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Margaret de Bohun, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Anne Wake en Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1367. En 1383, su ocupación registrada era lord lieutenant of ireland. Murió el 29 de julio de 1406, en Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Devon, Inglaterra.
